overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a frontier town. The character travels from a commercial street with brick storefronts, through a town square with a prominent courthouse, and finally to a waterfront pier, encountering horse riders and pedestrians along the way.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden sidewalk past storefronts, benches, and street lamps

entered.detail: two-story brick building with large windows and decorative stone trim
elevated wooden plank walkway running along the storefronts
stacked wooden crates and barrels on the sidewalk edge
ornate black metal street lamp with multiple lanterns
wooden pushcart with red fabric canopy selling goods
simple wooden slatted bench against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden sidewalk in a frontier town commercial district. Brick buildings line the left side with storefronts featuring awnings and wanted posters, while wooden crates and street lamps punctuate the walkway. The scene is narrow and enclosed by the buildings.

events.description: exits wooden sidewalk and steps onto dirt street crossing toward the courthouse
horse rider passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: crossing the dirt street toward the prominent courthouse building with clock tower

notable_agents.action: riding a horse across the street from right to left in the background

entered.detail: large brick building with prominent clock tower and white columns at entrance
open dirt plaza with scattered benches and small trees
unpaved dirt street with visible wagon tracks

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the covered sidewalk and crosses a wide dirt street toward an impressive courthouse with a clock tower. The space opens up into a town square plaza. A horse rider passes in the background as the character approaches the courthouse steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with hotel and saloons

events.description: turns away from courthouse and proceeds down a different street toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking down the street away from the courthouse, passing the Lodging Hotel and various storefronts

entered.detail: three-story brick building with large painted sign reading LODGING Hotel
two-story wooden building with balcony and saloon signage

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks away from the courthouse down a commercial street lined with buildings including a prominent Lodging Hotel on the left and wooden saloons on the right. The street remains unpaved and dusty.

events.description: ground transitions from packed dirt to softer sand as character approaches waterfront buildings
group of two horse riders pass by on the right moving toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking toward the waterfront past wooden buildings and horse riders

notable_agents.action: riding horses along the street toward the waterfront

entered.detail: large two-story wooden building with balcony facing the water
wooden steps leading up to the pier deck

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the waterfront district where the ground becomes sandy. A large wooden saloon building sits near the water's edge. Horse riders pass by as the character approaches wooden stairs leading up to the pier.

events.description: ascends wooden stairs onto the waterfront pier deck

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden stairs onto the pier and continuing toward the water past benches and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward the character on the pier

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank pier extending over the water with railings
large wooden cargo crane with counterweight for loading ships
red wooden slatted benches lined along the pier railing
calm blue water with distant shoreline visible
covered wooden gazebo structure at the end of the pier

segments.scene_description: The character ascends onto a wooden pier extending over the water. The deck features benches, a large cargo crane, and a covered gazebo. Other pedestrians walk along the pier as the character moves toward the water's edge with views of the ocean and distant shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a frontier town that transitions from a narrow commercial district into an expansive waterfront pier. It begins along a wooden sidewalk enclosed by brick storefronts and wanted posters, before the space opens up as the character crosses a wide dirt street toward a courthouse with a prominent clock tower. The scene then shifts back into a dusty commercial corridor lined with saloons and a lodging hotel, moving steadily toward the coast where the ground turns to sand. As the character passes a waterfront saloon and horse riders, the camera ascends a set of wooden stairs to reach a pier equipped with a cargo crane and a gazebo. The movement finally concludes at the water's edge, overlooking the ocean and a distant shoreline.
